'''Imperial Headquarters''' was the seat of power for the [[Imperial Remnant]]. Located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]] in the capital city [[Ravelin]], it was a towering black monolith, with a crystalline starburst at the pinnacle. This starburst could be used as a docking bay for important visitors, and also contained [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon's]] [[Pellaeon Gardens|personal arboretum]].

Imperial Headquarters apparently survived the [[Battle of Bastion]] on Bastion during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] or was quickly rebuilt, as Pellaeon looked forward to returning there following the end of the conflict, and it still existed as of the [[Sith–Imperial War]].
